overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a snowy forest at night. The character travels along a dirt path surrounded by dense pine trees while snow falls gently, creating a dark atmospheric environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest path surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with snow dusting the ground
tall dark pine trees forming a dense wall along the left side
tall dark pine trees forming a dense wall along the right side
low stone wall or rock formation running along the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous walking through a dense, dark forest at night. The path is narrow and enclosed by tall pine trees on both sides with no visible sky. A low stone wall runs along the right side of the trail. Snow falls gently through the darkness as the character moves forward.

events.description: tree canopy opens revealing night sky with moonlight, increasing ambient illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the forest density decreases slightly

entered.detail: dark cloudy night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly as the character continues walking, revealing patches of night sky through the tree canopy. The ambient light increases slightly with moonlight filtering through. The stone wall remains visible on the right, now closer to the path, while snow continues to fall.

events.description: warm orange light from a distant campfire or torch becomes visible ahead on the path
character passes the light source positioned on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a campfire light while maintaining steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: warm orange glowing light source illuminating the path ahead, likely a campfire or torch
large boulders and rocky terrain replacing the stone wall on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a warm campfire light visible in the distance along the forest path. As the character walks past the light source on the left, the illumination briefly lights up the scene and the character's armor. The terrain becomes rockier on the right side with large boulders, while the forest opens up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, dark forest that gradually opens up toward a distant light source. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by towering pine trees and a low stone wall, with snow falling gently through the oppressive darkness. As the character moves forward, the dense canopy begins to break, allowing moonlight to filter through and reveal patches of the night sky. The scene then shifts as the path becomes rockier with large boulders appearing on the right, leading the camera toward a warm, flickering campfire. Finally, the illumination from the fire briefly lights up the character's armor and the surrounding woods as the forest opens up ahead.
